--- Round 1 --- The question asks about "百亚股份" (Baiya Shares) and the change in "公允价值变动收益" (fair value change income) from the previous reporting period to the current period. I need to: 1. First check if this document (DOC1) is about 百亚股份 2. Find the fair value change income data for the current period and previous period 3. Calculate or find the change Let me start by opening section [2] 主要财务数据 or [5.2.2] 合并利润表 to find the fair value change income data. The profit statement (合并利润表) would typically contain this line item. Let me first check section [2.1] 主要会计数据和财务指标 to see if this document is about 百亚股份 and get an overview of the financial data. {"action":"open","anchor_id":"2.1","expected_evidence":"公司主体名称及主要财务数据，包括公允价值变动收益相关数据"} (一)主要会计数据和财务指标 单位：元 币种：人民币 |项目|本报告期|本报告期比上年同期增减变动幅度(%)| |---|---|---| |营业收入|178,433,368.68|11.59| |归属于上市公司股东的净利润|16,879,402.30|84.58| |归属于上市公司股东的扣除非经常性损益的净利润|14,853,521.80|94.02| |经营活动产生的现金流量净额|2,537,009.63|132.19| |基本每股收益（元/股）|0.04|100.00| |稀释每股收益（元/股）|0.04|100.00| |加权平均净资产收益率（%）|1.21|增加 0.52个百分点| |-|-|-|-| |---|---|---|---| |-|本报告期末|上年度末|本报告期末比上年度末增减变动幅度(%)| |总资产|2,073,317,746.15|2,054,884,830.25|0.90| |归属于上市公司股东的所有者权益|1,372,331,439.42|1,369,004,428.10|0.24| --- Round 2 --- The from section [2.1] shows financial data but doesn't include "公允价值变动收益" (fair value change income). This section shows revenue, net profit, cash flow, etc., but not the specific line item I need. Also, I notice this document doesn't explicitly state the company name in this section. I need to check if this is actually 百亚股份's report. Let me check the profit statement (合并利润表) at [5.2.2] which should contain the fair value change income line item. I should also check if there's a section that shows the company name or if I can find the fair value change income data elsewhere. This document is NOT about 百亚股份 (Baiya Shares). The document header clearly states: "编制单位：宁波弘讯科技股份有限公司" (Prepared by: Ningbo Hongxun Technology Co., Ltd.) 2. The fair value change income (公允价值变动收益) line item shows "-" for both 2024 Q1 and 2023 Q1, meaning there was no fair value change income in either period. Since this document is about 宁波弘讯科技股份有限公司, not 百亚股份, this document is irrelevant to the question about 百亚股份. I should stop and indicate that this document is irrelevant to the question. {"action":"stop","reason":"此文档为宁波弘讯科技股份有限公司的2024年一季度报告，不是百亚股份的财报，与问题无关"}
